query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS payroll_records (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  positionHolderId INT NOT NULL,
  positionId INT NOT NULL,
  businessEntityId INT NOT NULL,
  houseId INT NOT NULL,
  payPeriodStart TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  payPeriodEnd TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  payDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  regularHours DECIMAL(6,2) DEFAULT 0,
  overtimeHours DECIMAL(6,2) DEFAULT 0,
  grossPay DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  regularPay DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  overtimePay DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  bonusPay DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  commissionPay DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  federalIncomeTax DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  stateIncomeTax DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  localIncomeTax DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  socialSecurityTax DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  medicareTax DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  healthInsurance DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  retirement401k DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  otherDeductions DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  deductionDetails JSON,
  totalDeductions DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  netPay DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  paymentMethod ENUM('direct_deposit', 'check', 'cash') DEFAULT 'direct_deposit',
  checkNumber VARCHAR(20),
  employerSocialSecurity DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  employerMedicare DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  employerFuta DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  employerSuta DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  status ENUM('pending', 'processed', 'paid', 'voided', 'adjusted') DEFAULT 'pending',
  processedAt TIMESTAMP,
  createdBy INT,
  approvedBy INT,
  approvedAt TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

  netPay DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  paymentMethod ENUM('direct_deposit', 'check', 'cash') DEFAULT 'direct_deposit',
